overview.value: Aloe Vera is a succulent with thick water-storing leaves. It needs strong light, fast-draining soil, and long dry periods between watering.

localizedContentsJSON.value: {"en":{"commonName":"Aloe Vera","overview":"Aloe Vera is a succulent with thick water-storing leaves. It needs strong light, fast-draining soil, and long dry periods between watering.","tips":"A gritty cactus mix and drainage hole are more important than frequent watering."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"芦荟","overview":"芦荟是叶片肥厚、能储水的多肉植物。它需要充足光照、快速排水的土壤，以及两次浇水之间较长的干燥期。","tips":"颗粒感强的仙人掌介质和排水孔，比频繁浇水更重要。"}}
